title: carlina chamaeleon
intro: Carlina chamaeleon, also known as Elephant's Head or Alpine Hawk's Beard, is a flowering plant that belongs to the sunflower family. Traditionally, this plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Carlina chamaeleon include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Carlina chamaeleon can be found in teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to treat various health conditions, but it's recommended to consult a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
